Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Claimant Thanh Tran is Denied; Defendant has not shown any basis for the bank account being exempt. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. =(301/PJB)
